Infer actual search intent ONLY from SERP structure using:
- Page types (service / blog / landing / ecommerce / directory)

- Pricing sections

Return:

1. Content Gaps
- Important missing subtopics competitors did not cover

2. Structural Patterns

3. Keyword Clusters
- Group LSI and related keywords into semantic clusters
4. Weakness Exploitation Plan
- Areas where competitors are thin
- Outdated content opportunities
- Weak CTAs
- Missing trust signals (EEAT gaps)
5. Differentiation Strategy
- How to be more comprehensive

4. Sales Intensity & Tone:
